title: Panopticon Insight
description: An insight produced by the AI coaching layer. Phase 5 deliverable — schema is intentionally minimal in Phase 1 and will expand. Stored in the local SQLite `insights` table.

generated_utc.description: Epoch ms when the LLM call completed.

kind.description: What kind of insight this is.

persona.description: Which persona produced the insight. Null for non-persona system outputs (e.g. anomaly_flag).

covers_period.description: Time range this insight covers, if applicable.

body.description: The insight text, as rendered for the user.

supporting_metrics_json.description: Structured metrics the insight is grounded in (e.g. focus minutes, notification counts). Used for the 'show your work' UI affordance.

user_reaction.description: User's response to the insight, if they recorded one. Feeds future tuning of persona selection and prompt assembly.
